questions.context_sentence: I visited the science museum.
questions.hint: mu（母）+ se（色）+ um（嗯）：母亲在色彩丰富的博物馆里嗯了一声。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我参观了科学博物馆。

questions.context_sentence: Yes, there was a space exhibition.
questions.hint: ex（外）+ hi（嗨）+ bit（一点）+ ion（名词后缀）：在外面对着展览大声说嗨，一点点看。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 是的，那里有一个太空展览。

questions.context_sentence: I didn't mean to, but I gave them the wrong directions.
questions.hint: di（第）+ rec（记录）+ tion（后缀）：第一条记录方向的信息。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I didn't mean to, but I gave them the wrong ____. (提示: 方向)
questions.cn: 我不是故意的，但我给了他们错误的指示。

questions.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
questions.hint: t（特）+ rip（撕开）：特别想撕开地图去旅行。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你的污水处理厂学校旅行怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
questions.hint: waste（浪费/废物）+ water（水）= 废水
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你的污水处理厂学校旅行怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: How was your school trip to the wastewater plant?
questions.hint: p（铺）+ lant（蓝天）：工厂铺满了蓝天下的土地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How was your school trip to the wastewater ____? (提示: 工厂)
questions.cn: 你的污水处理厂学校旅行怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: Well, first, dirty water from our homes goes into the plant.
questions.hint: in（在内）+ to（向）= 进入……内部
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 嗯，首先，我们家里的脏水会进入处理厂。

questions.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
questions.hint: re（重新）+ move（移动）：重新移动就是把它移开。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Then, special screens ____ large pieces of waste from the water. (提示: 移开; 拿走)
questions.cn: 然后，特殊的滤网从水中清除大块的垃圾。

questions.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
questions.hint: pi（屁）+ ece（鹅）：一只屁股大的鹅被分成了好几块。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 然后，特殊的滤网从水中清除大块的垃圾。

questions.context_sentence: Then, special screens remove large pieces of waste from the water.
questions.hint: w（我）+ aste（阿司特）：我把阿司特扔了，它是废弃物。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 然后，特殊的滤网从水中清除大块的垃圾。

questions.context_sentence: Well, large machines remove germs and other things from the water.
questions.hint: ma（马）+ chine（吃的）：马在吃机器生产的饲料。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 嗯，大型机器可以去除水中的细菌和其他东西。

questions.context_sentence: Well, large machines remove germs and other things from the water.
questions.hint: ge（哥）+ rm（人民）：哥哥告诉人民要远离细菌。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 嗯，大型机器可以去除水中的细菌和其他东西。

questions.context_sentence: It takes a few more steps after that before the water becomes clean again.
questions.hint: s（死）+ tep（铁盆）：一步步跨过死人的铁盆。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It takes a few more ____ after that before the water becomes clean again. (提示: 步骤; 脚步)
questions.cn: 在那之后还需要几个步骤，水才能再次变得干净。

questions.context_sentence: I used to think it was easy to get clean water.
questions.hint: used（使用过/旧的）+ to（去）：过去经常去做，现在已经成了旧习惯。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I ____ think it was easy to get clean water. (提示: 过去常常(做))
questions.cn: 我过去认为获得干净的水很容易。

questions.context_sentence: I didn't realize it was so hard.
questions.hint: real（真实的）+ ize（使……化）：使事情变得真实，就是意识到或实现它。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I didn't ____ it was so hard. (提示: 认识到; 实现)
questions.cn: 我没有意识到它这么难。

questions.context_sentence: You could go inside them and see how astronauts live and work!
questions.hint: in（在里）+ side（边）= 在里边
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你可以进入里面，看看宇航员是如何生活和工作的！

questions.context_sentence: I can't go on the school trip tomorrow.
questions.hint: go（去）+ on a trip（在旅途中）= 去旅行
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我明天不能参加学校组织的旅行了。

questions.context_sentence: Do you keep a diary?
questions.hint: di（弟）+ ary（阿里）：弟弟在阿里山写日记。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你写日记吗？

questions.context_sentence: Do you agree with Sam that food tastes better when you work for them?
questions.hint: a（一个）+ gree（绿色）：大家都同意在那棵绿树下集合。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你是否同意山姆的观点，食物通过劳动获得会更美味？

questions.context_sentence: Fu Xing learnt about the cleaning process.
questions.hint: pro（向前）+ cess（走）：向前走的路程就是过程。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Fu Xing learnt about the cleaning ____. (提示: 过程)
questions.cn: 傅兴了解了清洁的过程。

questions.context_sentence: We went to the theatre to watch a show.
questions.hint: the（那个）+ atre（阿特雷）：阿特雷在那个剧场演戏。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们去剧院看了一场演出。

questions.context_sentence: We took a school trip to a factory.
questions.hint: fac（脸）+ tory（托里）：托里的脸在工厂里被熏黑了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们进行了一次去工厂的学校旅行。

questions.context_sentence: It was terrible!
questions.hint: terri（特里）+ ble（比乐）：特里吃比乐（槟榔）的感觉很糟糕。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 太糟糕了！

questions.context_sentence: My favourite actor, the day before yesterday, I saw in a film.
questions.hint: act（表演）+ or（人）= 演员
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我最喜欢的演员，前天，我在一部电影里看到了他。

questions.context_sentence: We saw many things such as old photos, paintings, and guns.
questions.hint: g（公）+ un（安）：公安拿着枪。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们看到了很多东西，比如旧照片、绘画和枪支。

questions.context_sentence: We also tried on some uniforms from the past.
questions.hint: try（尝试）+ on（在身上）= 试穿
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We also ____ some uniforms from the past. (提示: 试穿)
questions.cn: 我们还试穿了一些过去的校服。

questions.context_sentence: We walked along the mountain roads and thought about the past.
questions.hint: a（一）+ long（长）：沿着一条长长的路走。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们沿着山路走着，想着过去的事情。

questions.context_sentence: We walked along the mountain roads and thought about the past.
questions.hint: ro（肉）+ ad（广告）：路上到处都是卖肉的广告。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们沿着山路走着，想着过去的事情。

questions.context_sentence: Many people back then worked hard to create what we have today.
questions.hint: cre（渴）+ ate（吃）：渴了想吃东西，于是创造了饮料。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Many people back then worked hard to ____ what we have today. (提示: 创造)
questions.cn: 那时，很多人努力工作才创造了我们今天所拥有的一切。

questions.context_sentence: Record thoughts and feelings.
questions.hint: re（反复）+ cord（心）：反复记在心上，就是记录。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Do you like to ____ your daily life in a diary? (提示: 记录)
questions.cn: 记录想法和感受。

questions.context_sentence: Improve writing skills.
questions.hint: s（死）+ kill（杀）：杀人的技能练到死。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 提高写作技巧。

questions.context_sentence: Write down new ideas.
questions.hint: write（写）+ down（向下/在本子上）= 写下来
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 写下新的想法。

questions.context_sentence: In the morning, we explored the farm.
questions.hint: ex（外）+ plore（普洛）：到外面普洛（到处走）去探索。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: In the morning, we ____ the farm. (提示: 探索)
questions.cn: 早上，我们探索了农场。

questions.context_sentence: There were large tents with tomatoes, cucumbers, and many other fruits and vegetables.
questions.hint: ten（十）+ t（头）：十个头挤在帐篷里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那里有很大的帐篷，里面有西红柿、黄瓜和许多其他水果和蔬菜。

questions.context_sentence: There were large tents with tomatoes, cucumbers, and many other fruits and vegetables.
questions.hint: cu（酷）+ cum（看）+ ber（吧）：这根黄瓜酷吧，快来看。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那里有很大的帐篷，里面有西红柿、黄瓜和许多其他水果和蔬菜。

questions.context_sentence: The farmer told us about how these fruits and vegetables go from the fields to our tables.
questions.hint: from（从）+ to（到）= 表示起止点
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How do these vegetables go ____ the fields ____ our tables? (提示: 从……到……)
questions.cn: 农民告诉我们这些水果和蔬菜是如何从田地里到我们餐桌上的。

questions.meaning: 直接; 立即; 笔直地
questions.context_sentence: Then we got straight to work!
questions.hint: st（死特）+ raight（来得）：死特来得很快，笔直地冲过来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 然后我们就直接开始工作了！

questions.context_sentence: Slowly, we filled many baskets.
questions.hint: f（饭）+ ill（病）：饭装满了碗，吃到病了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Slowly, we ____ many baskets with strawberries. (提示: 装满; 盛满)
questions.cn: 我们慢慢地装满了许多篮子。

questions.context_sentence: Slowly, we filled many baskets.
questions.hint: bas（巴士）+ ket（客特）：巴士载满了客特（筐子）。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们慢慢地装满了许多篮子。

questions.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
questions.hint: tea（茶）+ ch（吃）：一边喝茶一边吃，老师在教书。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The farmer ____ us how to cut branches. (提示: 教)
questions.cn: 下午，农夫教我们如何修剪番茄植株上的枝叶。

questions.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
questions.hint: br（播）+ anch（安其）：播种在树枝上安其（安装）果实。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 下午，农夫教我们如何修剪番茄植株上的枝叶。

questions.context_sentence: In the afternoon, the farmer taught us how to cut branches and leaves from tomato plants.
questions.hint: lea（累）+ f（飞）：叶子飞得很累。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 下午，农夫教我们如何修剪番茄植株上的枝叶。

questions.context_sentence: Finally, we watered the plants.
questions.hint: final（最终的）+ ly（副词后缀）= 终于
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 最后，我们给植物浇了水。

questions.context_sentence: It made me think of the saying, "Every grain comes from hard work."
questions.hint: think（思考）+ of（关于）= 想起某事
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It made me ____ the saying about hard work. (提示: 考虑; 想起)
questions.cn: 这让我想起了那句谚语，“粒粒皆辛苦”。

questions.context_sentence: Every grain comes from hard work.
questions.hint: g（个）+ rain（雨）：每一个雨点落下的地方都长出了谷物。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 每一粒粮食都来自辛勤的劳动。

questions.context_sentence: My mum cooked some for dinner, and they were fresh and delicious!
questions.hint: f（发）+ resh（热射）：新鲜的蔬菜在发热射光芒。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我妈妈做了一些晚饭，它们既新鲜又美味！

questions.context_sentence: They certainly taste better when you work for them!
questions.hint: certain（肯定的）+ ly（副词后缀）= 肯定地
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当你为了它们而努力时，它们当然味道更好！

questions.context_sentence: Read Sam's diary entry.
questions.hint: en（在里）+ try（尝试）：在入口处尝试进入。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 阅读山姆的日记。

questions.context_sentence: Today was an amazing day. There was a total solar eclipse in Wuhan!
questions.hint: solar（太阳的）+ eclipse（消逝/日食）= 太阳消逝（日食）
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 今天真是太棒了。武汉出现了日全食！

questions.meaning: 前程远大; 无限可能
questions.context_sentence: The sky is the limit!
questions.hint: sky（天空）+ is the limit（是极限）：天空才是极限，说明潜力无限。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Work hard and you will succeed. Remember, ____! (提示: 前程远大; 无限可能)
options: where there is a will there is a way
questions.cn: 天空才是极限！
